title: Install Tip PCA And Reconnect Cables
summary: Mount a replacement Tip (A-Axis) PCA, reconnect the documented FFC, Molex connectors, and three green terminal blocks, secure wiring so nothing is dangling, reinstall side panels if needed, and restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure after Tip (A-Axis) PCA replacement when the new PCA must be mounted, reconnected to the documented cable and connector types, wiring secured, panels reinstalled if needed, and the operator station restarted.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform internal hardware installation, reconnect the FFC, Molex connectors, and green terminal blocks, secure wiring, reinstall panels if needed, and restart the operator station.

safety_notes: This is not marked support-safe in the candidate and involves internal hardware installation and reconnection.
Do not leave cables or wires dangling near the PCA; secure with a wire tie if necessary.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the three (3) green terminal blocks
Access to top and/or bottom side panels
Referenced procedure: "Starting The Operator Station" on page 66

access_required: Access to the Tip (A-Axis) PCA mounting location
Access to side panels if reinstallation is required
Access to the operator station startup procedure on page 66
system_preconditions: Replacement Tip PCA is available for installation
Connector locations from removal are known so each connector can be returned to its original location

visual_references.description: A-axis PCA connection diagram that may help identify PCA connection points during reconnection.
Flat-flex cable figure showing the FFC at the A-axis PCA.
Tip cable routing figure useful for checking cable routing and ensuring wiring is not left dangling.
Installation diagram showing A-axis cable routing and wire tie handling points relevant to securing wiring.

steps.title: Mount the new Tip PCA
steps.purpose: Install the replacement PCA in its mounting position before reconnecting cables.
steps.instruction: Mount the new PCA using the four (4) M3 socket-head screws.
steps.expected_result: The replacement Tip PCA is physically installed and secured in place.
steps.healthy_condition: The PCA is mounted with all four M3 socket-head screws installed.
steps.failure_condition: The PCA cannot be mounted or cannot be secured with the specified four screws.

actions.label: Mount PCA
actions.exact_action: Mount the new PCA using the four (4) M3 socket-head screws.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis PCA connection layout and board orientation context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The PCA cannot be mounted securely with the four (4) M3 socket-head screws.

source_evidence.text: Mount the new PCA using the four (4) M3 socket-head screws.

steps.title: Reconnect the FFC
steps.purpose: Restore the flat-flex cable connection to the new PCA.
steps.expected_result: The FFC is connected to the new PCA.
steps.healthy_condition: The FFC is plugged into the PCA connection point.
steps.failure_condition: The FFC connection location is unclear or the FFC cannot be connected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: FFC connection location at the A-axis PCA.
A-axis PCA connection points for orientation while reconnecting the FFC.

stop_or_escalate_if: Connector locations are unclear or cannot be matched to their original positions from removal.

source_evidence.text: Plug in the FFC. [Image support needed: labeled diagram or figure showing the PCA and FFC connection location.]

Figure 7-14 "Flat-Flex Cable" appears on page 161... at the A-axis PCA the technician removes four M3 socket-head screws holding two FFC clamps, unplugs the old flat-flex cable, installs the new FFC, and reinstalls the clamps.

steps.title: Reconnect the Molex connectors
steps.purpose: Restore the PCA's Molex cable connections.
steps.expected_result: The Molex connectors are reattached to the PCA.
steps.healthy_condition: All Molex connectors are plugged into their original PCA locations.
steps.failure_condition: Molex connector locations are unclear or the connectors cannot be matched to their original positions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis PCA connector layout to help identify connector locations.

stop_or_escalate_if: Connector locations are unclear or cannot be matched to their original positions from removal.

source_evidence.text: Plug in the Molex connectors. [Image support needed: labeled diagram or figure showing the Molex connector locations on the PCA.]

steps.title: Reconnect the green terminal blocks
steps.purpose: Restore the three green terminal block connections to their original PCA positions.
steps.instruction: Plug in the three (3) green terminal blocks into the same locations from which they were removed.
steps.expected_result: All three green terminal blocks are reinstalled in their original locations.
steps.healthy_condition: Each of the three green terminal blocks is plugged into the same location from which it was removed.
steps.failure_condition: The original locations of the green terminal blocks are unclear or the blocks cannot be reinstalled in those locations.

actions.label: Connect green terminal blocks
actions.exact_action: Plug in the three (3) green terminal blocks into the same locations from which they were removed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis PCA connector layout for terminal block location context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Connector locations are unclear or cannot be matched to their original positions from removal.

source_evidence.text: Plug in the three (3) green terminal blocks into the same locations from which they were removed. [Image support needed: labeled diagram or figure showing the green terminal block locations on the PCA.]

steps.title: Secure wiring
steps.purpose: Prevent loose wiring from being left near the PCA after reconnection.
steps.instruction: Ensure none of the cables or wires are dangling; use a wire tie if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Cables and wires are secured and not dangling.
steps.healthy_condition: No cables or wires are dangling after installation.
steps.failure_condition: Cables or wires remain dangling or cannot be secured with a wire tie.

actions.label: Inspect cable security
actions.exact_action: Ensure none of the cables or wires are dangling.

actions.label: Tie off wiring if needed
actions.exact_action: Use a wire tie if necessary.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Cable routing path and general routing condition for the tip/A-axis area.
Wire tie handling points and routing guidance relevant to ensuring no wires dangle near the A-axis PCA.

stop_or_escalate_if: Cables or wires cannot be secured without dangling.

source_evidence.text: Ensure none of the cables or wires are dangling; use a wire tie if necessary.
Nearby text describes... securing the cable with wire ties... ensuring no wires dangle near the A-axis PCA.

steps.title: Reinstall side panels if needed
steps.purpose: Return the station enclosure to its required assembled state after PCA installation.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any removed top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: Required side panels are back in place.
steps.failure_condition: Required side panels cannot be reinstalled.

actions.label: Reinstall panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required side panels cannot be reinstalled.

source_evidence.text: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the operator station to service after PCA installation is complete.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.
steps.expected_result: The operator station restarts using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station restarts successfully using the referenced procedure.
steps.failure_condition: The operator station does not restart using the referenced startup procedure.

actions.label: Restart operator station
actions.exact_action: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.

stop_or_escalate_if: The operator station does not restart using the referenced startup procedure.

source_evidence.text: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.

success_criteria: The new Tip PCA is installed.
The three green terminal blocks are reconnected in their original locations.
No cables or wires are left dangling.
Top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled as needed.
The operator station restarts using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: The PCA is mounted with four (4) M3 socket-head screws.
All documented connectors are reattached in their original locations.
Wiring is secured and not dangling.
failure_conditions: Connector locations are unclear or cannot be matched to their original positions from removal.
Cables or wires cannot be secured without dangling.
The operator station does not restart using the referenced startup procedure.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if connector locations are unclear or cannot be matched to their original positions from removal.
Escalate if cables or wires cannot be secured without dangling.
Escalate if the operator station does not restart using the referenced startup procedure.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis PCA connection layout and connector location context.
FFC connection location at the A-axis PCA.
Tip/A-axis cable routing for verifying wiring is properly routed and not dangling.
Cable routing and wire tie handling points relevant to securing wiring near the A-axis PCA.
